heroHeadline:
Iranian Cluster Missiles Kill Elderly Couple in Ramat Gan; Ali Larijani Confirmed Killed;
USS Gerald Ford Ablaze — Heads for Repairs
heroSubtitle: Day 19: Iranian cluster warheads strike Ramat Gan, killing couple in 70s — first confirmed Israeli cluster munition fatalities. IRGC confirms attack 'in revenge for killing of Larijani' — Ali Larijani assassination confirmed. USS Gerald R. Ford sustains 30-hour fire, departs theater for repairs. IDF strikes IRGC Security HQ, logistics center, missile command node. US bunker busters hit Hormuz-area hardened missile sites. Mojtaba Khamenei reportedly wounded, family killed (unverified). Hormuz traffic doubling — Iran allowing more ships. Brent crude drops to ~$101. Trump counterterrorism chief Joe Kent resigns. Hezbollah rockets at northern Israel; IDF issues Tyre evacuation warning; Bachoura, Beirut struck. Arab/Islamic FMs convene in Riyadh.
footerNote: Data compiled from 100+ sources across 4 media poles as of March 18, 2026. All contested claims are marked. Multi-pole sourcing active.
